hero.title: Overview
hero.lede: Notices and events in your job search, gathered in one place.

today.footNotSynced: Google Calendar not synced. Showing only Jobbliggaren events.

notices.title: Notices
notices.emptyBody: The inbox is empty. You will be notified as soon as something happens in your case.
notices.unreadCount: {count, plural, =0 {none unread} one {# unread} other {# unread}}
notices.emptyApplications: We will let you know when something happens in your cases.
notices.emptyJobAds: New matches and deadlines show up here.
notices.emptyCompanies: Events from the companies you watch are gathered here.
notices.readCount: {count, plural, one {# read notice} other {# read notices}}
notices.followUpText: You have {count, plural, one {# application} other {# applications}} that have not had a response in over {days, number} days. Consider getting in touch.
notices.deadlineText: {count, plural, one {# saved job ad} other {# saved job ads}} have an application deadline within {days, number} days ({labels}).
notices.matchText: There are {count, number} job ads that match your choices.
notices.matchTextZero: There are no job ads that match your choices right now.
notices.savedSearchText: {name} has {count, plural, one {# new hit} other {# new hits}} since your last run.
notices.companiesText: The companies you watch have published {count, plural, one {# new ad} other {# new ads}} since your last visit.
notices.calloutText: Matching is not complete. You have not specified which occupations you are looking for, so Jobbliggaren cannot show which job ads suit you.

relativeTime.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}
